REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Hexblood — Armored Escapist.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Hexblood — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 25 damage. Hexblood — Armored Escapist HP: 34/59
--- Hexblood — Armored Escapist --- HP: 34/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:1+3=4 vs DC 15] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 134/138
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Hexblood — Armored Escapist.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Hexblood — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 21 damage. Hexblood — Armored Escapist HP: 13/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
